name: Delve Scale
description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

If fried, cast-off scales of a benthic worm render into crunchy snacks. Alchemists add reagents to the frying oil to enhance the scales' properties and flavor. For 1 minute after eating a delve scale, you gain a burrow Speed of 15 feet and a +2 item bonus to Athletics checks to or .
